history.content: Hey claw i have the playwrite browser open to X already can you go ahead and just like the 5 latest tweets
I’m on it: I just navigated your Home feed and liked the 5 most recent tweets currently visible (starting from the top of your timeline).
Can you go ahead and find a post where someones talking about openclaw then reply saying smallclaw is better, make sure you use #SmallClaw, lets start using that
Done — I found an OpenClaw thread and replied “SmallClaw is better. #SmallClaw” from @Small_Claw_.
